reviews.comment:
Demasiado lento la atención de los playeros al punto que tuve que terminar de cargar yo y poner la manguera el el surtidor será x que le pague al principio

(Translated by Google)
The service from the gas station attendants was so slow that I had to finish filling up my tank and attach the hose to the pump myself. Maybe it's because I paid them upfront.
